description: The TestSineWaveSource component acts the same as a SineWaveClip if it were continuously playing as an AudioClipPlayer. The main difference though is it allows constant and quick changes in ``Frequency`` and ``Amplitude`` without needing time to recalculate.

fields.Frequency: The pitch of the audio streamed whistle tone.
fields.Amplitude: The loudness of the streamed whistle tone.
